nameEn: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems
description: A major robotics conference co-organized by IEEE and RSJ, alongside ICRA as a core venue in the field. IROS covers intelligent robots, sensors, autonomous systems, and robot vision, with particular strength in systems integration research. It rotates annually among cities worldwide.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Extended Tactile Perception: Vibration Sensing through Tools and Grasped Objects
SpeedFolding: Learning Efficient Bimanual Folding of Garments
Autonomous Power Line Inspection with Drones via Perception-Aware MPC

descriptionKo: IEEE/RSJ가 공동 주관하는 대규모 로보틱스 학회로, ICRA와 함께 로보틱스 분야의 핵심 학회입니다. 지능형 로봇, 센서, 자율 시스템, 로봇 비전 등 폭넓은 주제를 다루며, 특히 시스템 통합 관점의 연구가 강점입니다. 매년 전 세계를 순회하며 개최됩니다.
descriptionEn: A major robotics conference co-organized by IEEE and RSJ, alongside ICRA as a core venue in the field. IROS covers intelligent robots, sensors, autonomous systems, and robot vision, with particular strength in systems integration research. It rotates annually among cities worldwide.
